
```{r}
################################################################################
## CMD3 download + filter + save to D:/cmd3/
## - Discovers available datasets for selected CMD3 data products
## - DRY_RUN mode: no downloads, just manifest of what would be pulled
## - Download mode: saves compressed .rds objects (no CSV)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(BiocManager)
  library(curatedMetagenomicData)
  library(MultiAssayExperiment)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
})

## ---- SETTINGS ---------------------------------------------------------------
out_dir <- "D:/cmd3"
DRY_RUN <- FALSE         # TRUE = no downloads; FALSE = download + save
RDS_COMPRESS <- "xz"     # "xz" smallest, "gzip" faster, "bzip2" in-between
SAVE_ABUNDANCE_MATRIX <- TRUE  # also save assay matrix separately as .rds
MAX_RETRIES <- 3         # retries per dataset download
SKIP_EXISTING <- TRUE    # TRUE = resume by skipping datasets marked done
DATA_PRODUCTS <- c(
  "relative_abundance",
  "marker_abundance",
  "marker_presence",
  "pathway_abundance",
  "pathway_coverage",
  "gene_families"
)

## Output folders
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(file.path(out_dir, "rds"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
manifest_path <- file.path(out_dir, "manifest.csv")

## Load sample metadata
if (!exists("sampleMetadata")) {
  data("sampleMetadata", package = "curatedMetagenomicData", envir = environment())
}
stopifnot(exists("sampleMetadata"))

## Add age decade bucket
sampleMetadata <- sampleMetadata %>%
  mutate(
    age_decade = case_when(
      is.na(age) ~ NA_character_,
      age < 10 ~ "0-9",
      age >= 10 & age < 20 ~ "10-19",
      age >= 20 & age < 30 ~ "20-29",
      age >= 30 & age < 40 ~ "30-39",
      age >= 40 & age < 50 ~ "40-49",
      age >= 50 & age < 60 ~ "50-59",
      age >= 60 & age < 70 ~ "60-69",
      age >= 70 & age < 80 ~ "70-79",
      age >= 80 & age < 90 ~ "80-89",
      age >= 90 ~ "90+"
    )
  )

## Filter to qualifying studies & make disease_class -------------------
qualifying_studies <- sampleMetadata %>%
  filter(body_site == "stool", age >= 18, !is.na(disease)) %>%
  group_by(study_name) %>%
  filter(
    any(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(disease), "\\bcrc\\b") |
        str_detect(str_to_lower(disease), "polyp|adenoma")
    ) |
      any(study_name == "HMP_2012")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    disease_lc = str_to_lower(disease),
    disease_class = case_when(
      disease_lc == "healthy" ~ "HC",

      # Polyp/Adenoma: specific first
      str_detect(disease_lc, "\\b(adenoma|polyp)\\b") & str_detect(disease_lc, "metasta") ~ "PA-M",
      disease_lc %in% c("adenoma", "few_polyps") ~ "PA",
      str_detect(disease_lc, "\\b(adenoma|polyp)\\b") ~ "PA+",

      # CRC: specific first
      str_detect(disease_lc, "\\bcrc\\b") & str_detect(disease_lc, "metasta") ~ "CRC-M",
      str_detect(disease_lc, "history") ~ "CRC-H",
      disease_lc == "crc" ~ "CRC",
      str_detect(disease_lc, "\\bcrc\\b") ~ "CRC+",

      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    disease_class = factor(
      disease_class,
      levels = c("Other", "HC", "PA", "PA+", "PA-M", "CRC", "CRC+", "CRC-H", "CRC-M")
    ),
    age_decade = if_else(age_decade %in% c("10-19", "20-29"), "18-29", age_decade)
  ) %>%
  select(
    study_name, sample_id, subject_id, antibiotics_current_use,
    age, age_category, age_decade, gender, BMI, smoker, ever_smoker, alcohol, alcohol_numeric, diet,
    country, location, population,
    study_condition, disease, disease_class, disease_subtype, disease_stage, disease_location,
    days_from_first_collection, days_after_onset,
    sequencing_platform, DNA_extraction_kit,
    cholesterol, wbc, rbc, stool_texture
  ) %>%
  mutate(sample_id = as.character(sample_id))

## Decide what diseases to keep
wanted_classes <- c("Other", "HC", "PA", "PA+", "PA-M", "CRC", "CRC+", "CRC-H", "CRC-M")

qualifying_studies <- qualifying_studies %>%
  filter(disease_class %in% wanted_classes)

## Discover which CMD3 datasets exist for those studies (robust)

# Get available dataset titles for each selected product (no download)
available_list <- lapply(DATA_PRODUCTS, function(p) {
  out <- try(curatedMetagenomicData(p, dryrun = TRUE), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(out, "try-error")) character(0) else as.character(out)
})
names(available_list) <- DATA_PRODUCTS
available <- unique(unlist(available_list, use.names = FALSE))

# Turn the dataset title string into a data.frame and extract study prefix
# Typical CMD3 format is: "<release_date>.<StudyName>.<data_product>"
avail_df <- tibble::tibble(dataset = available) %>%
  mutate(
    without_date = sub("^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}\\.", "", dataset),
    study_prefix = sub("\\.[^.]+$", "", without_date), # study token after date
    product      = sub("^.*\\.", "", dataset)          # product after last '.'
  ) %>%
  select(-without_date)

qualifying_study_names <- unique(trimws(as.character(qualifying_studies[["study_name"]])))

# Keep only datasets whose product contains "relative_abundance"
# (this handles variants like "species_relative_abundance" too)
# avail_df <- avail_df %>%
#   filter(str_detect(product, "relative_abundance"))

# Now match qualifying studies using the extracted study_prefix
wanted_datasets <- avail_df %>%
  filter(trimws(as.character(study_prefix)) %in% qualifying_study_names) %>%
  pull(dataset) %>%
  unique() %>%
  sort()

# Helpful debug output if still empty
if (length(wanted_datasets) == 0) {
  message("No datasets matched your study_name values.")
  message("Requested products: ", paste(DATA_PRODUCTS, collapse = ", "))
  message("Example qualifying study_name values:")
  print(head(qualifying_study_names, 20))

  message("\nExample available dataset titles:")
  print(head(available, 50))

  message("\nExample extracted study prefixes from available datasets:")
  print(head(unique(avail_df$study_prefix), 50))

  stop(
    "No matching datasets were found for your qualifying studies.\n",
    "Likely cause: study_name values don't match parsed dataset study tokens; see printed examples above."
  )
}

## Helper: safe filename ----------------------------------------------
safe_name <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_") %>%
    str_replace_all("_+", "_")
}

## Dry run (no downloads) OR download + save ---------------------------
manifest <- list()
if (file.exists(manifest_path)) {
  old_manifest <- tryCatch(read.csv(manifest_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(old_manifest) && nrow(old_manifest) > 0) {
    manifest <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(old_manifest)), function(i) old_manifest[i, , drop = FALSE])
  }
}

record_manifest <- function(row_df) {
  manifest[[length(manifest) + 1]] <<- row_df
  write.csv(bind_rows(manifest), file = manifest_path, row.names = FALSE)
}

for (ds in wanted_datasets) {
  dataset_start <- Sys.time()
  base <- safe_name(ds)
  done_flag <- file.path(out_dir, "rds", paste0(".done_", base, ".txt"))
  ds_info <- avail_df %>% filter(dataset == ds) %>% slice(1)
  study_prefix <- if (nrow(ds_info) == 1) ds_info$study_prefix else NA_character_
  product <- if (nrow(ds_info) == 1) ds_info$product else NA_character_

  if (!DRY_RUN && SKIP_EXISTING && file.exists(done_flag)) {
    record_manifest(data.frame(
      dataset = ds,
      study_prefix = study_prefix,
      product = product,
      experiment = NA_character_,
      assay_names = NA_character_,
      status = "SKIPPED_DATASET_DONE",
      n_samples_total = NA_integer_,
      n_samples_kept = NA_integer_,
      saved_se_rds = NA_character_,
      saved_abund_rds = NA_character_,
      saved_meta_rds = NA_character_,
      se_bytes = NA_real_,
      assays_bytes = NA_real_,
      meta_bytes = NA_real_,
      elapsed_sec = 0,
      error = NA_character_,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
    next
  }

  if (DRY_RUN) {
    record_manifest(data.frame(
      dataset = ds,
      study_prefix = study_prefix,
      product = product,
      experiment = NA_character_,
      assay_names = NA_character_,
      status = "DRY_RUN_WOULD_DOWNLOAD",
      n_samples_total = NA_integer_,
      n_samples_kept = NA_integer_,
      saved_se_rds = file.path(out_dir, "rds", paste0(base, "_filtered_SE.rds")),
      saved_abund_rds = if (SAVE_ABUNDANCE_MATRIX)
        file.path(out_dir, "rds", paste0("assays_", base, ".rds")) else NA_character_,
      saved_meta_rds = file.path(out_dir, "rds", paste0("metadata_", base, ".rds")),
      se_bytes = NA_real_,
      assays_bytes = NA_real_,
      meta_bytes = NA_real_,
      elapsed_sec = as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), dataset_start, units = "secs")),
      error = NA_character_,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
    next
  }

  message("\n=== Downloading: ", ds, " ===")

  ok <- FALSE
  err <- NA_character_

  mae <- NULL

  ## Download with retry
  for (attempt in seq_len(MAX_RETRIES)) {
    tryCatch({
      mae <- curatedMetagenomicData(ds, dryrun = FALSE)
      ok <- TRUE
      err <- NA_character_
    }, error = function(e) {
      ok <<- FALSE
      err <<- conditionMessage(e)
    })

    if (ok) break
    if (attempt < MAX_RETRIES) Sys.sleep(2)
  }

  if (!ok || is.null(mae)) {
    record_manifest(data.frame(
      dataset = ds,
      study_prefix = study_prefix,
      product = product,
      experiment = NA_character_,
      assay_names = NA_character_,
      status = "FAILED_DOWNLOAD",
      n_samples_total = NA_integer_,
      n_samples_kept  = NA_integer_,
      saved_se_rds = NA_character_,
      saved_meta_rds = NA_character_,
      saved_abund_rds = NA_character_,
      se_bytes = NA_real_,
      assays_bytes = NA_real_,
      meta_bytes = NA_real_,
      elapsed_sec = as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), dataset_start, units = "secs")),
      error = err,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
    next
  }

  # curatedMetagenomicData can return a MAE, a list of MAE, or a SE object.
  mae_items <- if (inherits(mae, "MultiAssayExperiment")) {
    list(mae)
  } else if (is.list(mae)) {
    mae
  } else {
    list(mae)
  }

  all_exps <- list()
  all_exp_names <- character(0)

  for (j in seq_along(mae_items)) {
    obj <- mae_items[[j]]
    obj_name <- names(mae_items)[j]
    if (is.na(obj_name) || obj_name == "") {
      obj_name <- paste0("obj", j)
    }

    if (inherits(obj, "MultiAssayExperiment")) {
      obj_exps <- MultiAssayExperiment::experiments(obj)
      obj_exp_names <- names(obj_exps)
      if (is.null(obj_exp_names) || any(obj_exp_names == "")) {
        obj_exp_names <- paste0("exp", seq_along(obj_exps))
      }
      for (k in seq_along(obj_exps)) {
        all_exps[[length(all_exps) + 1]] <- obj_exps[[k]]
        all_exp_names <- c(all_exp_names, paste0(obj_name, "__", obj_exp_names[[k]]))
      }
    } else if (inherits(obj, "SummarizedExperiment")) {
      all_exps[[length(all_exps) + 1]] <- obj
      all_exp_names <- c(all_exp_names, paste0(obj_name, "__exp1"))
    }
  }

  if (length(all_exps) == 0) {
    record_manifest(data.frame(
      dataset = ds,
      study_prefix = study_prefix,
      product = product,
      experiment = NA_character_,
      assay_names = NA_character_,
      status = "FAILED_PARSE",
      n_samples_total = NA_integer_,
      n_samples_kept  = NA_integer_,
      saved_se_rds = NA_character_,
      saved_meta_rds = NA_character_,
      saved_abund_rds = NA_character_,
      se_bytes = NA_real_,
      assays_bytes = NA_real_,
      meta_bytes = NA_real_,
      elapsed_sec = as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), dataset_start, units = "secs")),
      error = "Could not extract experiments from returned object",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
    next
  }

  exps <- all_exps
  exp_names <- all_exp_names

  qualifying_ids <- as.character(qualifying_studies[["sample_id"]])
  rows_before <- length(manifest)

  for (i in seq_along(exps)) {
    se <- exps[[i]]
    exp_name <- exp_names[[i]]
    exp_base <- safe_name(paste0(base, "__", exp_name))

    se_meta <- as.data.frame(colData(se))
    se_sample_ids <- if ("sample_id" %in% names(se_meta)) {
      as.character(se_meta$sample_id)
    } else {
      as.character(colnames(se))
    }

    keep_ids <- intersect(se_sample_ids, qualifying_ids)
    n_total <- ncol(se)
    n_keep <- length(keep_ids)

    if (n_keep == 0) {
      record_manifest(data.frame(
        dataset = ds,
        study_prefix = study_prefix,
        product = product,
        experiment = exp_name,
        assay_names = paste(names(SummarizedExperiment::assays(se)), collapse = ";"),
        status = "NO_MATCHING_SAMPLES",
        n_samples_total = n_total,
        n_samples_kept = 0L,
        saved_se_rds = NA_character_,
        saved_meta_rds = NA_character_,
        saved_abund_rds = NA_character_,
        se_bytes = NA_real_,
        assays_bytes = NA_real_,
        meta_bytes = NA_real_,
        elapsed_sec = NA_real_,
        error = NA_character_,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
      next
    }

    keep_idx <- se_sample_ids %in% keep_ids
    se_sub <- se[, keep_idx]
    kept_order <- se_sample_ids[keep_idx]

    meta_sub <- qualifying_studies %>%
      filter(sample_id %in% kept_order)
    meta_sub <- meta_sub[match(kept_order, meta_sub$sample_id), ]

    se_path <- file.path(out_dir, "rds", paste0(exp_base, "_filtered_SE.rds"))
    meta_path <- file.path(out_dir, "rds", paste0("metadata_", exp_base, ".rds"))
    saveRDS(se_sub, file = se_path, compress = RDS_COMPRESS)
    saveRDS(meta_sub, file = meta_path, compress = RDS_COMPRESS)

    abund_path <- NA_character_
    assays_size <- NA_real_
    if (SAVE_ABUNDANCE_MATRIX) {
      assays_list <- SummarizedExperiment::assays(se_sub)
      abund_path <- file.path(out_dir, "rds", paste0("assays_", exp_base, ".rds"))
      saveRDS(assays_list, file = abund_path, compress = RDS_COMPRESS)
      assays_size <- file.info(abund_path)$size
    }

    record_manifest(data.frame(
      dataset = ds,
      study_prefix = study_prefix,
      product = product,
      experiment = exp_name,
      assay_names = paste(names(SummarizedExperiment::assays(se_sub)), collapse = ";"),
      status = "OK",
      n_samples_total = n_total,
      n_samples_kept = n_keep,
      saved_se_rds = se_path,
      saved_meta_rds = meta_path,
      saved_abund_rds = abund_path,
      se_bytes = file.info(se_path)$size,
      assays_bytes = assays_size,
      meta_bytes = file.info(meta_path)$size,
      elapsed_sec = NA_real_,
      error = NA_character_,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }

  rows_after <- length(manifest)
  if (rows_after > rows_before) {
    runtime <- as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), dataset_start, units = "secs"))
    for (k in (rows_before + 1):rows_after) {
      manifest[[k]]$elapsed_sec <- runtime
    }
    write.csv(bind_rows(manifest), file = manifest_path, row.names = FALSE)
    writeLines(as.character(Sys.time()), con = done_flag)
  }
}

manifest_df <- bind_rows(manifest)
write.csv(manifest_df, file = manifest_path, row.names = FALSE)

session_file <- file.path(out_dir, "sessionInfo.txt")
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), con = session_file)

zipfile <- file.path(out_dir, "cmd3_stool_bundle.zip")
rds_files <- list.files(file.path(out_dir, "rds"), full.names = TRUE)
if (length(rds_files) > 0) {
  try(utils::zip(zipfile, files = rds_files), silent = TRUE)
}

message("\nDone.\nSaved to: ", normalizePath(out_dir, winslash = "/"))
message("Manifest: ", normalizePath(manifest_path, winslash = "/"))
message("Session info: ", normalizePath(session_file, winslash = "/"))
if (file.exists(zipfile)) {
  message("Zip: ", normalizePath(zipfile, winslash = "/"))
} else if (length(rds_files) == 0) {
  message("Zip not created: no files were saved under ", normalizePath(file.path(out_dir, "rds"), winslash = "/"))
} else {
  message("Zip not created: zip command failed. RDS files are still available under ", normalizePath(file.path(out_dir, "rds"), winslash = "/"))
}
```


```{r}
se_files <- list.files("D:/cmd3/rds", pattern = "_filtered_SE\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

if (length(se_files) == 0) {
  stop("No *_filtered_SE.rds files found in D:/cmd3/rds")
}

se_path <- se_files[1]
base <- sub("_filtered_SE\\.rds$", "", basename(se_path))

meta_path <- file.path("D:/cmd3/rds", paste0("metadata_", base, ".rds"))
assays_path <- file.path("D:/cmd3/rds", paste0("assays_", base, ".rds"))

se <- readRDS(se_path)
meta <- readRDS(meta_path)
assays_list <- readRDS(assays_path)


```
